message:
🌱 minio: server: [gateway] Support for Backblaze B2 (#1290)

* 🌱 Add minio: server: [gateway] Support for Backblaze B2 mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct minio namespace to minio-operator

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "minio-4072-server-gateway-support-for-backblaze-b2",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "minio: server: [gateway] Support for Backblaze B2",
+    "description": "server: [gateway] Support for Backblaze B2. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your minio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio-operator --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review minio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant minio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n minio-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl get configmap -n minio-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio\n```\nHello\n\nI think a lot of user could find a S3 gateway for B2 very useful, as there is a lot of backups tools for S3 and B2 is very cheap (0,005$/GB)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for server: [gateway] Support for Backblaze B2",
+        "description": "Implement backbla\n```yaml\nmsg=\"Unable to list buckets.\" cause=\"b2_list_buckets: 401: expired_auth_token: Authorization token has expired\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm server: [gateway] Support for Backblaze B2 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio-operator --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n minio-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/minio/minio/pull/5002",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "msg=\"Unable to list buckets.\" cause=\"b2_list_buckets: 401: expired_auth_token: Authorization token has expired\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "minio",
+      "community",
+      "object-storage",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/minio/minio/pull/5002"
+    },

+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
